title: Berlin Museum Bag Rules - Quick Summary
items: **Small bags are different from backpacks.** Museum Island rules use 30 x 20 x 10 cm as the line where larger bags need cloakroom or locker storage.
**Suitcases are a storage problem, not a museum plan.** If the bag is bigger than carry-on luggage, store it before you arrive at the museum.
**Humboldt Forum uses an A4-plus rule.** Bags larger than A4 should go to cloakroom or lockers, and larger luggage may not be accepted.
**Topography of Terror can work with carry-on luggage.** Its official FAQ says foyer lockers are available for carry-on luggage.
**Arrive light for timed tickets.** A five-minute bag decision can become a missed entry window if you arrive at the museum door too late.
